name: Bet You Can't Guess What They Are Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a jelly roll pan with cooking spray.
2. Line the pan with whole saltines.
3. In a saucepan, boil butter and light brown sugar together, stirring well for three to five minutes.
4. Pour the mixture over the saltines.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 12 minutes.
6. Remove from the oven.
7. While the mixture is still hot, pour chocolate morsels over it and spread evenly.
8. Sprinkle with chopped pecans.
9. Press everything into a single layer.
10. Refrigerate until the mixture hardens.
11. Break up into pieces.
12. Store in the refrigerator or freezer.
